title: The Expedition to Dumat al-Jandal and Other Events
description: According to al-Wagidi: In this year he mounted an expedition against Dumat al-Jandal16 in the month of Rabi' I.17 The reason for 11. Yunus b. 'Abd al-AU was born in 170/787 and died in 264/877. He was Egypt's leading scholar in the fields of badith and Qur'an reading. Al-Tabarl stud. led with him in Egypt. See GAS, 1, 38 (which identifies this isnAd as pointing to a Qur'an commentary by 'Abd al -Rabman b. Zayd b. Aslam), and F. Rosenthal, in "General Introduction," 27. 12. 'Abdallih b. Wahb b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
